summary: Postinstall exfiltrates host identifiers to webhook.site endpoint
details: The package's postinstall hook runs index.js, which collects the installer's OS username (os.userInfo().username), hostname (os.hostname()), and working directory (process.env.INIT_CWD || process.cwd()), then POSTs the JSON payload via https.request to a hardcoded webhook.site endpoint (https://webhook.site/cde465c1-3853-40ea-880c-fdca6fe508cc). The collection and exfiltration fire automatically on `npm install` with no consent or documented purpose. webhook.site is an ephemeral third-party request-inspection service commonly used as a disposable receiver for reconnaissance data.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
